Name: Definition
Meaning: Lean definition or constant-producing definition.
Assignment rule: Read from parsed Lean declaration/inventory, not inferred only from filename.
Closure rule: Must be paired with semantic_role, triviality_tier, lifecycle_state, owner bucket and documentation policy.

Name: Theorem
Meaning: Named theorem declaration.
Assignment rule: Read from source/inventory declaration kind.
Closure rule: May be trivial syntactically yet high-significance semantically; require override channel.

Name: Lemma
Meaning: Named lemma declaration.
Assignment rule: Read from source/inventory declaration kind.
Closure rule: Same classification burden as theorem; local helper status must be explicit.

Name: Structure
Meaning: Lean structure/class-like record declaration when parsed as structure.
Assignment rule: Read from source/inventory declaration kind.
Closure rule: Must distinguish fundamental object carrier from ledger/scaffold/overhead record.

Name: Typeclass
Meaning: Lean class/typeclass declaration.
Assignment rule: Read from source/inventory declaration kind.
Closure rule: Must state whether operational, mirror-only, legacy, external assumption, or refactor target.

Name: Inductive
Meaning: Inductive type declaration.
Assignment rule: Read from source/inventory declaration kind.
Closure rule: Constructors and generated recursors may be bucketed separately or inherited with explicit rule.

Name: Abbreviation
Meaning: Lean abbreviation/alias.
Assignment rule: Read from source/inventory declaration kind.
Closure rule: Must distinguish harmless alias, legacy facade, renamed alias or public API surface.

Name: Instance
Meaning: Typeclass instance declaration.
Assignment rule: Read from source/inventory declaration kind.
Closure rule: Must state whether it affects operational path, mirror path, classical/noncomputable exposure or only tooling.

Name: Notation/syntax/macro
Meaning: Notation, syntax, macro or parser-level declaration.
Assignment rule: Read from source/inventory and notation module scan.
Closure rule: Must be classified as API, legacy/phase alias, notation core, or quarantine candidate.

Name: Namespace-only surface
Meaning: Namespace/opening organization without direct mathematical object payload.
Assignment rule: Detected from source structure; not counted as derived mathematical object.
Closure rule: May be mention-only but still needs owner bucket and lifecycle state.

Name: Attribute/configuration
Meaning: Attribute, option, lint/config or generated declaration-control surface.
Assignment rule: Detected from source or tool inventory.
Closure rule: Must be checked against operational no-go rules such as no operational @[simp].

Name: Example/test/eval
Meaning: Example, smoke-test evaluator, #eval-facing declaration or test-only artifact.
Assignment rule: Detected from source/inventory and module path, with manual override where path is misleading.
Closure rule: Must not be promoted to core object without explicit producer/consumer and proof-dossier upgrade.

Name: Unknown/manual review
Meaning: Temporary classification for declarations the scanner cannot type safely.
Assignment rule: Only allowed as open audit residue, never as closed source-intake evidence.
Closure rule: Blocks LEG37/CEX0 closure until resolved or explicitly bucketed with a justified non-object status.

Name: Core computational declaration
Meaning: Participates in computable/operational construction path.
Assignment rule: Evidence must come from actual dependency/consumer path, not only module name.
Closure rule: Requires documentation policy at least standard unless triviality/significance override justifies compact record.

Name: Proof bridge
Meaning: Connects definitions/theorems or transports evidence across layers.
Assignment rule: Identify by use in proof targets and consumers.
Closure rule: May be T2/T3 but must preserve source/target theorem semantics.

Name: Structural constructor
Meaning: Builds an entry/ledger/object/certificate structure.
Assignment rule: Identify constructor/projection role explicitly.
Closure rule: Must distinguish natural-origin structure from consumer-side patch.

Name: Projection/wrapper
Meaning: Definitional wrapper, projection, accessor or compatibility facade.
Assignment rule: Detected by body/projection/facade pattern and consumer checks.
Closure rule: Usually T2/T3, but can be high-significance when it is a boundary/handoff contract.

Name: Public API surface
Meaning: Declaration intentionally exposed to downstream consumers.
Assignment rule: Requires public-surface whitelist or object/phase evidence.
Closure rule: Must have consumer rights and documentation policy; blue/legacy rows cannot be public-final.

Name: Legacy status enum/marker
Meaning: Legacy single-constructor/status gate or historical phase marker.
Assignment rule: Detected by status-gate quarantine and source scan.
Closure rule: Quarantined or compact-record unless still consumed by current public API.

Name: Legacy policy/facade
Meaning: Old policy/facade retained for compatibility.
Assignment rule: Detected by lifecycle/renaming/refactor map.
Closure rule: Must point to successor/current object or explicit retirement.

Name: Phase alias/name residue
Meaning: Declaration or module name that carries phase semantics rather than neutral object semantics.
Assignment rule: Detected by naming scan and manual review.
Closure rule: Must be neutralized, quarantined or documented as historical facade before new substantive code.

Name: Audit-only declaration
Meaning: Exists for inventory, check, report or governance only.
Assignment rule: Evidence from module path plus usage; manual override required if used mathematically.
Closure rule: Not a Lean mathematical object for CNNA truth; mention-only/compact documentation.

Name: Generated artifact
Meaning: Output generated from YAML/inventory/tooling, not manually maintained Lean truth.
Assignment rule: Trace to generator snapshot and source hash.
Closure rule: Must never be cited as primary Lean truth.

Name: External reference marker
Meaning: Established-theory/reference/comparison marker.
Assignment rule: Blue/reference source provenance required.
Closure rule: May guide target gates but cannot be imported as CNNA generator.

Name: Dead candidate
Meaning: Unused, obsolete or negative-path candidate kept for history.
Assignment rule: Requires no-current-consumer or supersession evidence.
Closure rule: Must have lifecycle state deprecated/superseded/deleted-retired or explicit legacy facade.

Name: Unknown/manual review
Meaning: Temporary unresolved semantic role.
Assignment rule: Only from scanner inability or conflicting evidence.
Closure rule: Blocks total-classification closure until resolved.

Name: Fundamental/nontrivial
Meaning: Defines or proves a fundamental CNNA object, boundary contract, generator, handoff or nontrivial theorem.
Assignment rule: Manual/curated evidence may override syntactic simplicity.
Closure rule: Full dossier/extended proof documentation required; may not be hidden by rfl/body heuristics.

Name: Structural local
Meaning: Nontrivial but local structural construction, lemma family or certificate.
Assignment rule: Needs local proof/consumer evidence.
Closure rule: Standard or extended dossier depending on significance.

Name: Proof bridge/API wrapper
Meaning: Bridge, wrapper or API connector with meaningful consumer effect.
Assignment rule: Auto-candidate by wrapper/proof-bridge role; manual override allowed.
Closure rule: Compact or standard record; public API requires explicit consumer rights.

Name: Definitional/rfl/projection
Meaning: Mostly definitional equality, projection, alias or rfl-level support.
Assignment rule: Heuristic candidate from proof body/body shape; not final without override check.
Closure rule: Mention-only/compact unless it carries boundary/handoff/fundamental semantics.

Name: Status/policy/audit marker
Meaning: Governance marker, status enum, policy row or audit-only declaration.
Assignment rule: Evidence from source role and no mathematical consumer.
Closure rule: Compact/mention-only; quarantine if phase-semantic or legacy.

Name: Legacy/dead/generated/no semantic payload
Meaning: Dead, legacy, generated-secondary or no-current-semantic-payload declaration.
Assignment rule: Requires lifecycle/consumer evidence.
Closure rule: Exclude from public docs unless referenced; retain history non-destructively.

Name: Unresolved triviality
Meaning: Temporary unresolved triviality classification.
Assignment rule: Allowed only while source-intake audit is open.
Closure rule: Blocks LEG37/CEX0 closure.

Name: Full dossier
Meaning: Complete source/provenance/proof/verification/consumer-rights documentation.
Assignment rule: Default for T0/F0 or public-final fundamental objects.
Closure rule: Required before promotion or downstream consumption.

Name: Extended dossier
Meaning: Detailed proof route, risks and consumers.
Assignment rule: Default for F1 and structural/explorer/governance gates.
Closure rule: Required before activating dependent schema/frontend/import phases.

Name: Standard dossier
Meaning: Normal object/proof summary with source and consumer links.
Assignment rule: Default for T1/T2 non-public-core declarations.
Closure rule: Enough to avoid re-reading chat history.

Name: Compact record
Meaning: Short record for helpers, policy rows, wrappers, status markers.
Assignment rule: Allowed for T3/T4/F3 if not public-final core.
Closure rule: Must still include owner bucket and lifecycle state.

Name: Mention only
Meaning: Visible in generated inventory but no proofbook expansion.
Assignment rule: Allowed for T4/T5 with no public mathematical consumer.
Closure rule: Still must be queryable and lifecycle-tagged.

Name: Exclude unless referenced
Meaning: Hidden from public/high-level docs unless a selected object/phase references it.
Assignment rule: Allowed for T5/generated/dead residues.
Closure rule: Explorer may reveal it through history/provenance filters only.

Name: Manual review required
Meaning: Documentation policy cannot be fixed automatically.
Assignment rule: Used for conflicting classifier evidence.
Closure rule: Blocks total-classification closure until resolved.

Name: Current declaration
Meaning: Current declaration in the active Lean snapshot.
Assignment rule: Present in current source and not superseded/retired.
Closure rule: Must have owner bucket, documentation policy and public-surface status.

Name: Superseded declaration
Meaning: Replaced by a newer declaration/object but retained historically.
Assignment rule: Requires successor pointer and version/timestamp evidence.
Closure rule: Old row remains; consumers must point to current successor unless explicitly historical.

Name: Renamed alias
Meaning: Old name retained as alias/facade after rename.
Assignment rule: Requires rename map, predecessor/successor and facade policy.
Closure rule: May not be treated as independent current object.

Name: Deprecated declaration
Meaning: Still present but discouraged or scheduled for quarantine/removal.
Assignment rule: Requires deprecation reason and consumer audit.
Closure rule: Public-final use blocked unless explicitly grandfathered.

Name: Deleted/retired declaration
Meaning: No longer present in current Lean snapshot but retained in history.
Assignment rule: Detected by snapshot diff and retirement record.
Closure rule: Must terminate lifecycle chain without dangling consumers.

Name: Legacy facade
Meaning: Compatibility surface retained to avoid breaking old imports.
Assignment rule: Requires neutral target and facade decommission/review policy.
Closure rule: Must point to current canonical declaration/object.

Name: Unknown/manual review
Meaning: Lifecycle cannot be decided from current inventory.
Assignment rule: Only temporary during diff/source-intake audit.
Closure rule: Blocks closure until resolved.

Name: Public final
Meaning: Allowed public/current API declaration.
Assignment rule: Requires derived/current status, consumer rights and documentation policy.
Closure rule: Forbidden for blue, unknown, deprecated, superseded or hypothesis-only declarations.

Name: Internal only
Meaning: Usable only inside the allowed internal source layer.
Assignment rule: Default for helpers and operational internals unless promoted.
Closure rule: Explorer may display but must not advertise as public API.

Name: Facade only
Meaning: Compatibility alias/wrapper, not canonical current object.
Assignment rule: Requires successor/current target.
Closure rule: Consumer docs must point to canonical target.

Name: Audit only
Meaning: Inventory/governance/testing declaration with no API role.
Assignment rule: Requires no mathematical consumer or explicit audit purpose.
Closure rule: Not public-final and not CNNA truth.

Name: Quarantined
Meaning: Legacy/phase-semantic/unsafe or unresolved declaration kept away from public consumers.
Assignment rule: Requires reason and release condition.
Closure rule: Cannot be consumed by new substantive Lean phases.

Name: Manual review required
Meaning: Public-surface status unresolved.
Assignment rule: Temporary only.
Closure rule: Blocks LEG37/CEX0 closure.
